name: Rand Paul
subject: How we restore liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, the Big
Government "consensus" in Washington, D.C. was at its height.

Few members of either party dared to question
Washington, D.C.'s out-of-control spending. Or government spying.
Or the Federal Reserve's "print-now, ask-questions-later"
policies. Or our never-ending military interventions.

Knowing I would take all of their madness on,
the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties went all out to
defeat me.

But with the help of patriots like you from
all over the country, I shocked the political world and won in
2010.

Patriot, it hasn't been easy -- and we have
so much more work to do -- but you and I have made a big
difference together by standing strong for liberty and our
Constitution.

Together, we galvanized the country for civil
liberties against the Obama administration's lawless use of
drones.

We stood strong against taxpayer handouts to
foreign governments.

We stopped President Obama's mad rush to gun
control in 2013.

We've fought BOTH parties' rush to hike the
national debt limit, calling for the REAL spending cuts that are
critical if we're ever going to address our $19 TRILLION in debt.

We stopped President Obama's mad dash to put
American boots on the ground in Syria and showed how misguided
military invention sometimes can embolden our enemies --
something that's taboo in most establishment circles.

We forced expiration of Section 215 of the
so-called "PATRIOT Act," which the NSA used to justify it's
unconstitutional bulk collection of data on American citizens.

And just recently, we forced the U.S. Senate
to vote on Audit the Fed and legislation defunding Planned
Parenthood.

At every turn, you and I are fighting and
DEFEATING the Washington machine.

That's why they will come after with
everything they have this year.

They know just forcing these battles is a
"win" for you and me.

The Big Government consensus in Washington,
D.C. is crumbling.

And you and I are holding the sledgehammer.

But Patriot, all of this comes at a price . .
. It's made me and my reelection the number-one target of the
tax-and-spenders.

The only way I will beat them is the same way
I've beaten them before.

With you.

So please, if at all possible, please
contribute to our End of Quarter Money Bomb today.

We still have so much work to do -- and only
4 days to meet this crucial fundraising deadline.

Let's finish what we started together and
finally restore liberty and the Constitution in America.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$10 MONEY BOMB >>

$25 MONEY BOMB >>

$50 MONEY BOMB >>

$100 MONEY BOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for U.S. Senate 2016

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Momentum
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We are on a path towards victory, and we took three more steps down that path last night with three YUGE wins in Alaska, Hawaii and Washington.
We won each of those states with more than 68 percent of the vote, same as we did last week in Idaho, Utah, and Democrats Abroad. We are significantly shrinking Hillary Clinton's lead, and we're going to keep it up.
**You are the momentum for our campaign.** When you vote, caucus, volunteer, or make a contribution, you are building our momentum. Every ballot, every phone call or door knocked, and every dollar moves us forward.
We are only doing so well because millions of people want us to do well. No billionaires, no super PACs. Just you, and the rest of our political revolution.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign now to keep building our momentum before Wisconsin votes.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full")
When working people and young people, when people who have given up on the political process get involved, that's how we win. They demand a government that represents them and not the 1 percent of our country. And if enough of us come together, they'll get it.
Right now we have the momentum. Momentum is having 14,000 people out in a rally in Salt Lake City about a week ago and 15,000 in Seattle on Monday night.
Momentum is in election after election, winning an overwhelming percentage of young people who are participating in the democratic process.
Momentum is having rallies and town meetings that have brought out **more than one million people over the course of this campaign.**
What we are seeing is that the people of this country want to make it a better country. They are prepared to stand up and fight and take on the major crises that we face. They want an economy that works for all of us, not just wealthy campaign contributors. They want the United States of America to join every other major country and guarantee health care to all people as a right.
Conservative, progressive, Republican, or Democrat -- they are all embarrassed by a corrupt campaign finance system that allows billionaires to buy elections.
And so they are fighting back, with almost 6 million contributions from nearly 2 million people, at an average of about $27 apiece.
[**Make a contribution of $3 right now to continue to build our momentum so we can win the Democratic nomination, the White House, and take back our country from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full")
I'm glad you are a part of this with me. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

With Rand in the Senate, liberty has a
chance.

We've seen it.

Since 2010, he's galvanized the country for
civil liberties and against the Obama administration's lawless
use of drones.

He's stood strong time and time again against
taxpayer handouts to foreign governments.

He stopped President Obama's mad rush to gun
control in 2013.

He's fought tirelessly against BOTH parties'
out of control spending habits.

He's stood strong against the NSA spying
programs.

And forced the U.S. Senate to vote on Audit
the Fed and legislation defunding Planned Parenthood.

Rand has fought at every turn to preserve our
freedoms and defeat the Washington machine.

I know, especially in these times, we can
trust Rand Paul to continue to be the voice for the Constitution
in the Senate.

And that puts a target on his back.

Liberal elites and the Washington
establishment are working hard to make sure there's no opposition
to their big tax-and-spend plans in 2017.

That's why it's so important we meet our
$200,000 goal on this End of Quarter Moneybomb.

>> JOIN OUR MONEY BOMB TODAY >>

We know they're ready to come after Rand with
everything they've got.

We need to be able to fire back.

Patriot, we can defeat the Washington machine
together.

So please, if at all possible, agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

Let's make sure Rand gets back to Washington
to restore liberty and the Constitution in America in the next
term.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

$10 MONEY BOMB >>

$25 MONEY BOMB >>

$50 MONEY BOMB >>

$100 MONEY BOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for U.S. Senate 2016

name: Josh Wolf
subject: please read (race update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2360/738133e4/34651e4d/7f820a51/482124601/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160327?refcode=pme160327_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
**" There's growing anxiety within the [Democratic] party that they'll blow a chance to retake the [Senate] chamber because of the GOP's financial edge." **\-- _Politico_ , 3/24/2016
[**Pitch in now to fight back >>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2360/738133e4/34651e4d/7f820a51/482124601/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160327?refcode=pme160327_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
Friends -- A lot has happened on the ground lately, and I wanted to catch you up:
* First, Marco Rubio dropped out of the presidential race after a devastating loss here in Florida -- a huge opportunity for us to take back his seat.

* Next, the **fourth poll in a row** came out showing Patrick winning the Democratic primary! This is real momentum.

* But then, some bad news -- _Politico_ says the only thing standing in the way of Democrats retaking the Senate is the GOP's huge cash advantage.

**It 's CRITICAL that we meet our end of quarter goal by Thursday's FEC deadline** \-- otherwise, we just won't have the resources to stand up to the GOP in this huge swing state. We don't have the Koch brothers and Karl Rove, but we have the grassroots -- and we need you in this moment.

We have $32,467 left to go to hit our goal. [**Will you pitch in right away to stand up to the GOP and win back Rubio 's seat?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2360/738133e4/34651e4d/7f820a51/482124601/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160327?refcode=pme160327_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Murphy for Florida

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2360/738133e4/34651e4d/7f820a52/482124601/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
